incorrects.description: Student selected 16: counted the symbols (4) times 4 instead of using the scale (5)

params.description: Key highlights showing each symbol = 5 books

steps.text: The key tells us what each symbol means. Each one stands for 5 books, not 1. Skip-count by 5s, not by 1s.

incorrects.description: Student answered incorrectly. System models the correct answer.

params.description: System highlights each symbol in sequence while counting by 5s: 5, 10, 15, 20

steps.text: Let me show you. The key says each symbol means 5 books. So we count by 5s. First symbol: 5. Second: 10. Third: 15. Fourth: 20. The answer is 20 books.
